fonts.heading: Chivo
fonts.instructions: Do NOT use Inter for headings. Use font-black (900) for large headings, with tracking-tighter. Use IBM Plex Mono for ATS keywords, metrics, and labels to emphasize technical precision.

colors.instructions: No full-page gradients. Use pure monochrome structure with primary blue (#002FA7) strictly for primary actions. The UI should look like a high-end technical document. Scores MUST use the semantic success/warning/destructive colors.

surfaces_and_borders.shadows: none, use 1px solid borders to define hierarchy
surfaces_and_borders.glassmorphism: Not recommended for this archetype. Use solid white backgrounds.
surfaces_and_borders.cards: border-collapse style layout, border-r border-b border-border.

layout_strategy.general_spacing: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use p-8 or p-12 for main containers.
layout_strategy.dashboard_grid: MODE B: THE 'CONTROL ROOM' GRID. Base grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6).
layout_strategy.resume_optimizer_pattern: Synchronized split panes. grid-cols-2. Sticky comparison header (z-10, top-0, bg-white) for document context. Inline deltas for keyword changes (green highlight for added, red strike for removed).
layout_strategy.ats_score_card: Bento layout. 1 massive number block (Score) spanning col-span-1. List of missing keywords block (col-span-2). Match % gauge block.

customization_rules: Remove border-radius from Shadcn components (set --radius to 0 in css)
Buttons must have sharp corners, tracking-wide text, and high contrast hover states (hover:bg-black hover:text-white or hover:bg-blue-800)
Forms: Use Shadcn Input, Textarea. Add focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary focus:outline-none.
File Upload: Large dashed border area, p-12, minimalist icon. No playful illustrations.

rules: Hover states: precise background color shifts or 1px sharp translations

icons.style: Regular or Bold weights, avoid Duotone for this brutalist archetype

image_urls.description: Minimalist Swiss style geometric abstract background for login page or dashboard hero background. Use as full cover behind forms or headers.

instructions_to_main_agent: Update index.css to set --radius: 0rem to achieve the sharp technical look
Import Chivo and IBM Plex Sans from Google Fonts in index.html or global css
Build the dashboard using pure white and light grey backgrounds, separated by 1px borders.

For the Resume Optimizer: Build a split-pane layout (left: original, right: optimized) using grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2. Make the column headers sticky so the user never loses context while scrolling.
For the ATS Score Card: Use a Bento grid. Make the Score number massive (text-6xl+ font-black) and color-coded. Use IBM Plex Mono for listed missing keywords.
All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='upload-resume-button').
